From the original user request, they wanted to compare data from a "scadenziario" file (expense schedule) for January found in chuck/BI/ against a previously created cash flow.

  <request>Comparison and validation of January scadenziario (expense schedule) data against generated cash flow in chuck/BI/</request>

  <learned>Scadenziario represents actual monthly outflows and serves as ground truth for cash flow validation; discrepancies were found in three key areas: rental/lease costs (22-04), various charges (22-09), and fixed assets (02 Immobilizzazioni); the immobilization entry was incorrectly formatted as a note rather than a data row with proper monthly values</learned>
  <completed>Cash flow file regenerated with three corrections applied: (1) 22-04 renamed to "Affitto/Noleggio" with March value 1.342,49 added, (2) 22-09 March value updated from 3.827,17 to 3.932,66, (3) 02 Immobilizzazioni converted from note to data row with Jan=7.096,64, Feb=0,37, Mar=449,99; March net cash flow verified as 175.778,68 (275.670,64 inflows minus 99.891,96 outflows)</completed>

</summary>
